executiveSummary: Dave Brown's Pest Control has an impressive resume — voted Best Pest Control in Butte County four consecutive years (2020-2023), 30+ years of experience, and a family-run business that customers love. Your website even has some smart SEO foundations: LocalBusiness schema, Google Analytics, location-specific pages, and a clean modern design.

But here's what I found during my audit: your sitemap is indexing 12 junk pages from a construction template that have nothing to do with pest control — pages about scaffolding, cabinetry, masonry, and custom staircases. These are being submitted to Google right now, diluting your search authority and confusing search engines about what your business actually does.

Beyond the junk pages, you have zero blog content in a keyword-rich industry, only 3 service pages for a company that handles dozens of pest types, duplicate location pages creating canonicalization issues, and a Gmail address instead of branded email. The good news: your site has a better foundation than most competitors. These fixes would unlock significant organic traffic growth.

assessment.title: Website Analysis — davebrownpestcontrol.com
points: Clean, professional design with consistent branding — yellow/gray color scheme, modern fonts.
LocalBusiness, WebPage, BreadcrumbList, and WebSite schemas implemented — better than most local service sites.
Google Analytics (GA4) and Google Tag Manager installed — you're collecting data.
11 location-specific pages (Chico, Durham, Oroville, Paradise, Orland, etc.) — smart for local SEO.
Trust badges in footer: Angi, Yellow Pages, BBB, Reader's Choice logos.
12 JUNK PAGES indexed in sitemap — scaffolding blueprints, cabinetry, masonry, custom staircases. Template leftovers actively hurting SEO.
Using Gmail (davebrownspestcontrol@gmail.com) instead of branded email.
Image alt text has misspellings: 'roden remmoval' instead of 'rodent removal.'

assessment.title: Content & Service Page Gaps
points: Only 3 service pages total: General Pest Control, Rodent Control, Wasp Removal. This is extremely thin for a 30+ year company.
Missing individual pages for: termites, ants, spiders, bed bugs, cockroaches, fleas, gophers, moles, mosquitoes — each a separate ranking opportunity.
Zero blog content — no seasonal pest guides, no prevention tips, no local pest alerts for Butte County.
FAQ page exists with 6 questions but lacks FAQ schema markup — missing rich snippet opportunities.
Duplicate location pages: both /chico-ca/ and /location/chico-ca/ exist — creates canonicalization issues.
'Best of Butte County 2020-2023' award barely mentioned — should be front and center in meta descriptions and schema.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Western Termite Solutions competes in the same market with a significantly weaker website.
Clark Pest Control and other regional chains have strong SEO but lower local trust.
Most local pest control companies in Butte County aren't investing in content marketing — there's an opening.
Your 4-year Best of Butte County streak is a powerful differentiator that most competitors can't match.
Companies that publish seasonal pest content (spring ant season, fall rodent migration) consistently outrank those that don't.

findings.finding: 12 junk template pages (scaffolding, cabinetry, masonry) indexed in Google
Zero blog content in a keyword-rich pest control market
Only 3 service pages — missing individual pages for 10+ pest types
6 FAQs exist but lack FAQ schema markup for rich results
Location pages exist at both root and /location/ paths — canonicalization risk
Misspellings in alt text ('roden remmoval') — hurts image SEO
LocalBusiness schema, clean design, analytics — good foundation

strategy.title: Phase 1: Clean Up & Fix (Months 1-2)
actions: Delete or noindex the 12 junk template pages immediately — scaffolding, cabinetry, masonry, etc.
Resolve duplicate location pages — set canonical URLs to prevent confusion.
Set up branded email (dave@davebrownpestcontrol.com) to replace Gmail.
Add FAQ schema markup to existing FAQ page for rich snippet visibility.
Fix misspelled image alt text and add descriptions to all images.
Rewrite homepage meta description to lead with 'Best Pest Control in Butte County 2020-2023.'
Add AggregateRating schema to testimonials page.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Expand & Build (Months 3-5)
actions: Create 10-15 individual pest service pages: Termite Treatment, Ant Control, Spider Removal, Bed Bug Treatment, Cockroach Extermination, Flea/Tick Control, Gopher Removal, etc.
Launch blog: 'Spring ant season in Chico CA,' 'Rodent-proofing your home before winter,' 'Termite signs every Butte County homeowner should know.'
Expand FAQ to 15+ questions with detailed answers.
Optimize Google Business Profile with regular posts, Q&A, and photo uploads.
Launch review solicitation strategy — leverage the Best of Butte County brand.
Reduce page load: audit third-party scripts (GA4, GTM, Jetpack, Gauges, Stripe — that's a lot of JS).

strategy.title: Phase 3: Dominate (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads for high-intent pest control keywords during peak seasons.
Video content: pest identification guides, treatment process videos, customer testimonials.
Email marketing for seasonal pest alerts and prevention reminders.
Monthly reporting on traffic, rankings, lead generation, and review growth.
Competitor monitoring to maintain search position advantage.

pricingIntro: Dave Brown's Pest Control has a stronger website foundation than most local competitors — it needs cleanup, content expansion, and strategic SEO to start performing at the level your reputation deserves.
about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work — no layers of account managers.
nextSteps: Dave, the 12 junk pages in your sitemap are an easy fix that would immediately improve your search performance. I'd love to show you what else is possible.
Free 30-minute strategy call — reach me at (530) 786-3655 or reply to this email.
Four straight years as Best Pest Control in Butte County is a story worth telling online. Let's make sure Google knows it too.
